summary: Resubmission build — guideline fixes, polish, and bill reminders on your home screen.

introduced: What's New splash when you open an updated version
Home screen icon badge for bills due soon
Auto-scrolling daily quote on the dashboard
changed: Bill due badges on the Bills tab and list rows only
fixed: App Store compliance updates for app capabilities
App icon full-bleed rendering without white borders
removed: Dashboard weather forecast (not needed on phone and tablet)
